entry.title: Shadows of Desire
entry.summary:
Author: c0ca1ne_sunday

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,581Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 73

Summary: Damian Wayne is living with his father and the Bat-Family, everything was going perfectly. Until one day during training, things get a little too intimate with his adopted brother Dick – who, in Damian's humble opinion, is an idiot, but a hot idiot.These thoughts triggered a series of confusing feelings, new sensations, and self-discovery for the younger boy.Or, Damian is falling for Dick while wanting to slip his hand down his pants.

entry.summary:
Author: noctstate

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,118Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 65
